'''âg-m-d-y''' ('''kagamdeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoextract|immunoextract]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoextract|immunoextract]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-m-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagamdeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==

''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
